id.description: A unique identifier of the dataset.

title.description: An optional human readable title for the dataset. Will be derived from id if not provided explicitly.

description.description: An optional description of the dataset.

tags.description: A list of strings - metadata tags of this dataset.

table_path.description: A table path in the data source delimited by / character.

sql.description: A sql statement that represent a table.

oneOf.title: Primary key
oneOf.description: A primary key for the given dataset.

oneOf.title: Composite primary key
oneOf.description: A primary key for the given dataset.

fields.description: A list of fields in this dataset.

references.description:
A list of references, specifies the relations between datasets.
Foreign dataset is defined in "dataset" attribute and will always be joined by it's grain.
Current dataset will be join by the column name defined in "using" attribute.

workspace_data_filters.description: A list of workspace data filters to be applied to the dataset.

data_source.description: An optional data source id used for the specific dataset.

precedence.description: An optional precedence value for the dataset (whole positive number).

id.description: A unique identifier of the date instance.

title.description: An optional human readable title for the date instance. Will be derived from id if not provided explicitly.

description.description: An optional description of the date instance.

tags.description: A list of strings - metadata tags of this date instance.

title_base.description: A title for the title formatting

title_pattern.description: A pattern for the title formatting

id.description: A unique identifier of the metric.

title.description: An optional human readable title for the metric. Will be derived from id if not provided explicitly.

description.description: An optional description of the metric.

tags.description: A list of strings - metadata tags of this metric.

show_in_ai_results.description: Optional flag to indicate if the metric should be shown in AI results. When omitted, the metric is visible.

id.description: A unique identifier of the dashboard.

title.description: An optional human readable title for the dashboard. Will be derived from id if not provided explicitly.

description.description: An optional description of the dashboard.

tags.description: A list of strings - metadata tags of this dashboard.

cross_filtering.description: Whether cross filtering is enabled for this dashboard. Defaults to true.

user_filters_reset.description: Whether user can reset custom updated filters. Defaults to true.

user_filters_save.description: Whether user filter setting will be stored in local storage. Defaults to true.

filter_views.description: Whether user can save and apply filter views for this dashboard. Defaults to true.

enable_section_headers.description: Applies to the root layout. Whether all sections headers are enabled. Defaults to true.

sections.description: A list of sections in this dashboard.

plugins.description: A list of plugins in this dashboard.

id.description: An unique identifier of the plugin.

parameters.description: Parameter that will be passed to the plugin. Everything other than string will be serialized to JSON automatically.

oneOf.description: An unique identifier of the plugin.

tabs.description: A list of tabs in this dashboard. Each tab has its own layout, filters, and filter configurations. Mutually exclusive with sections and filters at dashboard level.

id.description: A unique identifier of the plugin.

title.description: An optional human readable title for the plugin. Will be derived from id if not provided explicitly.

description.description: An optional description of the plugin.

tags.description: A list of strings - metadata tags of this plugin.

title.description: An optional human readable title for the attribute hierarchy. Will be derived from id if not provided explicitly.

description.description: An optional description of the attribute hierarchy.

tags.description: A list of strings - metadata tags of this attribute hierarchy.

attributes.description: A list of sorted attributes use in attribute hierarchy. The first attribute is the top level attribute.

id.description: A unique identifier of the dashboard.

title.description: An optional human readable title for the dashboard. Will be derived from id if not provided explicitly.

description.description: An optional description of the dashboard.

tags.description: A list of strings - metadata tags of this dashboard.

cross_filtering.description: Whether cross filtering is enabled for this dashboard. Defaults to true.

user_filters_reset.description: Whether user can reset custom updated filters. Defaults to true.

user_filters_save.description: Whether user filter setting will be stored in local storage. Defaults to true.

filter_views.description: Whether user can save and apply filter views for this dashboard. Defaults to true.

enable_section_headers.description: Applies to the root layout. Whether all sections headers are enabled. Defaults to true.

sections.description: A list of sections in this dashboard.

plugins.description: A list of plugins in this dashboard.

id.description: An unique identifier of the plugin.

parameters.description: Parameter that will be passed to the plugin. Everything other than string will be serialized to JSON automatically.

oneOf.description: An unique identifier of the plugin.

tabs.description: A list of tabs in this dashboard. Each tab has its own layout, filters, and filter configurations. Mutually exclusive with sections and filters at dashboard level.

title.description: Optional title of the section

description.description: Optional description of the section

widgets.description: A list of widgets in this section.

id.description: A unique identifier of the tab.

title.description: Display title for the tab.

sections.description: A list of sections in this tab.

id.description: A unique identifier of the widget.

content.description: A markdown content of the widget

columns.description: An optional width of the widget in the grid, total width being 12 columns

rows.description: An optional height of the widget in the grid, each row being ~20px high

id.description: A unique identifier of the widget.

columns.description: An optional width of the widget in the grid, total width being 12 columns

rows.description: An optional height of the widget in the grid, each row being ~20px high

visualizations.description: A list of visualizations to be rendered with the widget

container.description: A unique identifier of the widget.

columns.description: An optional width of the widget within the grid. When the parent container's direction is set to 'row', widget widths can vary up to the width of the container. Widgets are placed next to each other and wrap to the next row when their combined width exceeds that of the container. When the direction is set to 'column', the width does not need to be set, or it should match the width of the container.

rows.description: An optional height of the widget within the grid, where each row is approximately 20px high. When the parent container's direction is 'row', the height should be greater than the total height of all rows formed by wrapped widgets in the container where row height is determined by highest widget in the row. When the direction is 'column', each widget occupies one row; therefore, the height must be equal to or greater than the combined height of all widgets in the container.

layout_direction.description: Layout direction for the container widgets

enable_section_headers.description: Whether header of sections in the layout is enabled. Defaults to true

sections.description: A list of sections contained in this container

title.description: Optional title of the section

description.description: Optional description of the section

widgets.description: A list of widgets in this section

hierarchy.description: An id of the attribute hierarchy to be ignored

on.description: An id of the drill down to be ignored

template.description: An id of the date attribute hierarchy template to be ignored

on.description: An id of the drill down to be ignored

ignored_drill_downs_intersection.title: Ignored Drill Down Intersection
ignored_drill_downs_intersection.description: An ignored drill down intersection item

attributes.description: An attributes list to be ignored

hierarchy.description: An attribute hierarchy that is related to attributes that will be ignored

id.description: A unique identifier of the widget.

visualization.description: An id of the visualization to be rendered with the widget

oneOf.description: Explicitly disable the title of the widget

anyOf.description: Explicitly disable the description of the widget
Inherit the description from the visualization

columns.description: An optional width of the widget in the grid, total width being 12 columns

rows.description: An optional height of the widget in the grid, each row being ~20px high

date.description: An id of the date dataset to be used for date filtering in this widget

ignored_filters.description: A list of dashboard filters to be ignored for this widget

items.description: An id of the dashboard label, attribute or date to be ignored

zoom_data.description: Enable zooming to the data for certain types of visualizations

ignored_drill_downs.description: A list of drill downs to be ignored for this widget

ignored_drill_downs_intersections.description: A list of drill downs intersections to be ignored for this widget

ignored_cross_filtering.description: Whether cross filtering is disabled for this widget

open_url.description: An url to be opened on interaction

href.description: An ID of the attribute that holds the url to be opened on interaction

label.description: An id of the attribute that holds the label for the url to be opened on interaction

open_dashboard.description: An id of the dashboard to be opened on interaction

open_dashboard_tab.description: An optional id of the tab to be opened in the target dashboard

open_visualization.description: An id of the visualization to be opened on interaction

interactionIgnoredIntersectionAttributes.description: Attribute local IDs to ignore in the drill intersection

interactionIgnoredDashboardFilters.description: Dashboard filter local IDs to exclude when drilling to this visualization

interactionIncludedSourceInsightFilters.description: Source insight filter IDs to include when drilling to this visualization

interactionIncludedSourceMeasureFilters.description: Source measure-level filter IDs to include when drilling to this visualization

interactionClickOn.description: An id of the metric or attribute that will trigger the interaction

id.description: A unique identifier of the dataset.

title.description: An optional human readable title for the dataset. Will be derived from id if not provided explicitly.

description.description: An optional description of the dataset.

tags.description: A list of strings - metadata tags of this dataset.

table_path.description: A table path in the data source delimited by / character.

sql.description: A sql statement that represent a table.

oneOf.title: Primary key
oneOf.description: A primary key for the given dataset.

oneOf.title: Composite primary key
oneOf.description: A primary key for the given dataset.

fields.description: A list of fields in this dataset.

references.description:
A list of references, specifies the relations between datasets.
Foreign dataset is defined in "dataset" attribute and will always be joined by it's grain.
Current dataset will be join by the column name defined in "using" attribute.

workspace_data_filters.description: A list of workspace data filters to be applied to the dataset.

data_source.description: An optional data source id used for the specific dataset.

precedence.description: An optional precedence value for the dataset (whole positive number).

id.description: A unique identifier of the date instance.

title.description: An optional human readable title for the date instance. Will be derived from id if not provided explicitly.

description.description: An optional description of the date instance.

tags.description: A list of strings - metadata tags of this date instance.

title_base.description: A title for the title formatting

title_pattern.description: A pattern for the title formatting

dataset.description: A dataset id to join to.

sources.description: A primary key for the given dataset.

multi_directional.description: Defines if dataset connection can work in both directions. Optional, defaults to false.

filter_id.description: Filter identifier to be applied to the dataset source column.

data_type.description: A column data type in the physical database.

title.description: A human readable title of the field. Optional, derived from id if not provided explicitly.

description.description: An optional description of the field.

tags.tags: A list of strings - metadata tags for this field.

source_column.description: A column name in the physical database. Optional, equals to id by default.

data_type.description: A column data type in the physical database.

default_view.description: An Id of the label to be used by default for this field

sort_column.description: A column name in the source table to do sorting by

show_in_ai_results.description: Optional flag to indicate if the attribute should be shown in AI results. When omitted, the attribute is visible.

locale.description: Locale string in BCP 47 format used for default label sorting.

is_nullable.description: Optional flag to indicate if the attribute can contain null values.

null_value_join_replacement.description: Optional value which can be used as replacement for NULL in join conditions.

title.description: A human readable title of the field. Optional, derived from id if not provided explicitly.

description.description: An optional description of the field.

tags.tags: A list of strings - metadata tags for this field.

source_column.description: A column name in the physical database. Optional, equals to id by default.

data_type.description: A column data type in the physical database.

show_in_ai_results.description: Optional flag to indicate if the fact should be shown in AI results. When omitted, the fact is visible.

is_nullable.description: Optional flag to indicate if the fact can contain null values.

null_value_join_replacement.description: Optional value which can be used as replacement for NULL in join conditions.

description.description: An optional description of the field.

tags.tags: A list of strings - metadata tags for this field.

source_column.description: A column name in the physical database. Optional, equals to id by default.

data_type.description: A column data type in the physical database.

aggregated_as.description: Aggregation method for the fact. Mapped to sourceFactReference in the API.

assigned_to.description: ID of the source fact this aggregated fact is based on. Mapped to sourceFactReference in the API.

is_nullable.description: Optional flag to indicate if the aggregated fact can contain null values.

null_value_join_replacement.description: Optional value which can be used as replacement for NULL in join conditions.

locale.description: Locale string in BCP 47 format (for example en-US or cs-CZ-u-kn-true).

source_column.description: A column name in the physical database.

data_type.description: A column data type in the physical database.

title.description: An optional human readable title for the label.

description.description: An optional description of the label.

tags.description: A list of strings - metadata tags of this label.

show_in_ai_results.description: Optional flag to indicate if the label should be shown in AI results. When omitted, the label is visible.

locale.description: Locale string in BCP 47 format used for default label sorting.

translations.description: Optional list of localized source columns for this label.

is_nullable.description: Optional flag to indicate if the label can contain null values.

null_value_join_replacement.description: Optional value which can be used as replacement for NULL in join conditions.

id.description: Identifier of a GEO collection describing valid areas.

source_column.description: Column that stores the localized label values.

locale.description: Locale string in BCP 47 format that identifies the translation.

data_type.description: A column data type in the physical database.

target.description: A target dataset one of primary key or date.

is_nullable.description: Optional flag to indicate if the reference source can contain null values.

null_value_join_replacement.description: Optional value which can be used as replacement for NULL in join conditions.

id.description: A unique identifier of the metric.

title.description: An optional human readable title for the metric. Will be derived from id if not provided explicitly.

description.description: An optional description of the metric.

tags.description: A list of strings - metadata tags of this metric.

show_in_ai_results.description: Optional flag to indicate if the metric should be shown in AI results. When omitted, the metric is visible.

id.description: A unique identifier of the plugin.

title.description: An optional human readable title for the plugin. Will be derived from id if not provided explicitly.

description.description: An optional description of the plugin.

tags.description: A list of strings - metadata tags of this plugin.

aggregation.description: Aggregation function to use for this field.

oneOf.description: Identifier to use for this field.
List of identifiers to use for this field.

operator.description: Arithmetic operator to use for this field.

type.description: Type of relative period metric related to another metric in list.

date_filter.description: Date filter to use for this field.

title.description: A field title.

show_all_values.description: Show all values in the attribute filter (do not ignore empty and NULL).

using.description: Attribute or label identifier to use for this field.

filter_by.description: A list of filters in this query.

period.description: Number of periods ago to use for this field.

by.description: Local attribute or label to use in this sort.

items.description: Metric identifier or local metric to use for this sort.

by.description: Local attribute or label to use in this sort.

element.description: Value of attribute or label to use for this sort.

function.description: Aggregation function to use for this sort.

field.description: A field name in the report.

axis.description: Axis to use for this bucket. Only applicable for "combo" charts.

display_as.description: Chart type to use for this bucket. Only applicable for "repeater" charts.

totals.description: A list of totals in this bucket.

type.description: Type of visualisation for this layer.

config.description: Configuration of layer of defined type.

metrics.description: A list of metrics in this layer.
